subject: Probability: Definitions and Properties
topic: §7 Probability of Intersection, Union, and Complementary Event
question: A mattress store sells only king, queen and twin-size mattresses. Sales records at the store indicate that one-fourth as many queen-size mattresses are sold as king and twin-size mattresses combined. Records also indicate that three times as many king-size mattresses are sold as twin-size mattresses. Calculate the probability that the next mattress sold is either king or queen-size.
